episodes.body: John started working at TechCorp as a Junior Developer.
John was promoted to Senior Developer at TechCorp.
John transitioned to a Project Manager role at TechCorp.

queries.query: What is John's current role at TechCorp?
queries.expected_reason: The Project Manager role is the most recent position John holds at TechCorp.

queries.query: What was John's role at TechCorp in April 2024?
queries.expected_reason: In April 2024, John had not yet transitioned to Project Manager.

episodes.body: Emily joined InnovateX as a Marketing Specialist.
Emily was promoted to Marketing Manager at InnovateX.
Emily became the Head of Marketing at InnovateX.
Emily took on the role of Chief Marketing Officer at InnovateX.

queries.query: What is Emily's current position at InnovateX?
queries.expected_reason: Emily's role as Chief Marketing Officer is the most recent and current position.

queries.query: What was Emily's role at InnovateX in June 2023?
queries.expected_reason: In June 2023, Emily had not yet become Head of Marketing.

queries.query: Describe the progression of Emily's roles at InnovateX.
queries.gold_answer: Marketing Specialist -> Marketing Manager -> Head of Marketing -> Chief Marketing Officer
queries.expected_reason: The query requires a chronological sequence of Emily's roles.

episodes.body: John subscribed to the Basic Plan at StreamFlix.
John upgraded to the Premium Plan at StreamFlix.
John switched to the Family Plan at StreamFlix.

queries.query: What plan is John currently subscribed to at StreamFlix?
queries.expected_reason: The Family Plan is the most recent subscription change for John.

queries.query: What plan did John upgrade to in May 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The Premium Plan was John's subscription in May 2023.

queries.query: What was John's initial subscription plan at StreamFlix?
queries.expected_reason: The Basic Plan was John's first subscription at StreamFlix.

episodes.body: Emma signed up for the Starter Plan at MovieHub.
Emma upgraded to the Standard Plan at MovieHub.
Emma switched to the Deluxe Plan at MovieHub.
Emma downgraded to the Basic Plan at MovieHub.

queries.query: What is Emma's current subscription plan at MovieHub?
queries.expected_reason: The Basic Plan is Emma's most recent subscription change.

queries.query: What plan did Emma have in March 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The Deluxe Plan was Emma's subscription in March 2023.

queries.query: What was Emma's first subscription plan at MovieHub?
queries.expected_reason: The Starter Plan was Emma's initial subscription at MovieHub.

episodes.body: The price of the ZetaPhone was set at $699 at its launch.
Due to increased demand, the price of the ZetaPhone was raised to $749.
A holiday discount reduced the ZetaPhone price to $699.

queries.query: What was the price of the ZetaPhone on July 1, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The price was $749 due to a price increase in June.

queries.query: What is the current price of the ZetaPhone?
queries.expected_reason: The holiday discount price of $699 is the current price.

queries.query: What was the initial launch price of the ZetaPhone?
queries.expected_reason: The launch price was $699, regardless of later changes.

episodes.body: The initial price of the OmegaWatch was set at $299.
A new model release increased the OmegaWatch price to $349.
A spring sale reduced the OmegaWatch price to $279.
The OmegaWatch price was adjusted to $329 due to market changes.

queries.query: What was the price of the OmegaWatch during the spring sale?
queries.expected_reason: The spring sale price was $279.

queries.query: What is the latest price update for the OmegaWatch?
queries.expected_reason: The latest price update was $329 in September.

queries.query: What was the OmegaWatch price before the new model release?
queries.expected_reason: The price was $299 before the new model increased it.

episodes.body: Version 1.0 of the Nimbus software was released, introducing basic cloud storage capabilities.
Nimbus software was updated to version 1.5, adding enhanced security features.
Version 2.0 of Nimbus software launched, featuring AI-driven analytics.
Nimbus software version 2.1 was released, improving AI analytics and fixing bugs.

queries.query: What is the latest version of Nimbus software?
queries.expected_reason: Version 2.1 is the most recent update.

queries.query: What features were introduced in Nimbus version 2.0?
queries.expected_reason: AI-driven analytics was introduced in version 2.0.

queries.query: Describe the development timeline of Nimbus software.
queries.expected_reason: The timeline includes all versions released.

episodes.body: TechSuite released version 3.0 of their software, introducing a new user interface.
Version 3.1 of TechSuite software was launched, offering improved performance.
TechSuite software version 4.0 was released, adding machine learning capabilities.
Version 4.1 of TechSuite software was launched, enhancing machine learning features.

queries.query: What is the current version of TechSuite software?
queries.expected_reason: Version 4.1 is the current version at the query time.

queries.query: What improvements were made in TechSuite version 3.1?
queries.expected_reason: Version 3.1 focused on performance improvements.

queries.query: How did TechSuite software evolve over time?
queries.expected_reason: The evolution includes all major version updates.

episodes.body: On May 1st, a minor fire broke out in the storage room of TechCorp's main office. The fire was quickly contained by the building's sprinkler system.
TechCorp announced that the fire caused minimal damage and operations would resume as normal by the next day.
An investigation revealed that the fire was caused by an electrical fault. TechCorp scheduled a full electrical inspection for the following week.
The electrical inspection at TechCorp's main office was completed, and all systems were deemed safe.

queries.query: What caused the fire at TechCorp on May 1st?
queries.expected_reason: The investigation revealed the cause after the initial containment report.

queries.query: What is the current status of TechCorp's office safety inspection?
queries.expected_reason: The inspection was completed and confirmed safe.

queries.query: What was TechCorp's immediate response to the fire?
queries.gold_answer: Operations would resume as normal by the next day
queries.expected_reason: The announcement was made before the investigation results.

episodes.body: A data breach was detected at SecureData Inc., affecting customer information.
SecureData Inc. confirmed that the breach was contained and no financial data was compromised.
Further analysis showed that the breach was due to a vulnerability in third-party software.
SecureData Inc. completed a full security audit and implemented additional safeguards.

queries.query: What caused the data breach at SecureData Inc.?
queries.expected_reason: The cause was identified after initial containment.

queries.query: What is the latest update on SecureData Inc.'s security measures?
queries.expected_reason: The security audit completion is the most recent update.

queries.query: What was SecureData Inc.'s initial report about the data breach?
queries.gold_answer: Breach was contained and no financial data was compromised
queries.expected_reason: The initial report focused on containment and data safety.

episodes.body: The government introduced a new tax policy reducing corporate tax rates to 20%.
An amendment was made to the tax policy, increasing corporate tax rates back to 25% due to economic changes.
The tax policy was revised again, setting corporate tax rates at 22% to balance fiscal needs.

queries.query: What was the corporate tax rate as of March 2024?
queries.expected_reason: The 22% rate is the most recent and valid as of March 2024.

queries.query: What was the corporate tax rate in February 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The 20% rate was valid in February 2023.

queries.query: What is the latest amendment to the corporate tax policy?
queries.gold_answer: The tax policy was revised to 22% in January 2024.
queries.expected_reason: The January 2024 revision is the latest amendment.

episodes.body: In January 2023, the GreenTech project was initiated under the leadership of John Doe.
By May 2023, leadership of the GreenTech project transitioned to Emily Smith.
In February 2024, the GreenTech project was taken over by Michael Brown.

queries.query: Who is currently leading the GreenTech project?
queries.expected_reason: Michael Brown is the latest leader of the GreenTech project as of the query time.

queries.query: Who was leading the GreenTech project in May 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Emily Smith was the leader during May 2023.

queries.query: What is the history of leadership for the GreenTech project?
queries.gold_answer: John Doe, Emily Smith, Michael Brown
queries.expected_reason: The query requires a timeline of all leadership changes.

episodes.body: The SolarWave initiative was started with Sarah Lee as the project owner.
In November 2022, leadership of the SolarWave initiative was transferred to David Kim.
By July 2023, the SolarWave initiative was under the direction of Rachel Green.

queries.query: Who is the current owner of the SolarWave initiative?
queries.expected_reason: Rachel Green is the most recent project owner as of the query time.

queries.query: Who was leading the SolarWave initiative in December 2022?
queries.expected_reason: David Kim was the leader in December 2022.

queries.query: What is the sequence of project owners for SolarWave?
queries.gold_answer: Sarah Lee, David Kim, Rachel Green
queries.expected_reason: The query requires a chronological list of all project owners.

episodes.body: John enrolled in the 'Introduction to Quantum Physics' course at Newton University.
John switched from 'Introduction to Quantum Physics' to 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' at Newton University.
John dropped 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' and enrolled in 'Quantum Computing Basics' at Newton University.

queries.query: What course is John currently enrolled in at Newton University?
queries.expected_reason: The 'Quantum Computing Basics' enrollment is the most recent and valid as of the query time.

queries.query: What course did John enroll in first at Newton University?
queries.expected_reason: The 'Introduction to Quantum Physics' course was the first enrollment chronologically.

episodes.body: Emily registered for 'Modern Art History' at Picasso College.
Emily transferred from 'Modern Art History' to 'Renaissance Art' at Picasso College.
Emily switched to 'Contemporary Art Studies' at Picasso College.
Emily returned to 'Modern Art History' at Picasso College.

queries.query: What was Emily's course at Picasso College in December 2022?
queries.expected_reason: The 'Renaissance Art' course was active for Emily in December 2022.

queries.query: What is Emily's latest course enrollment at Picasso College?
queries.expected_reason: The 'Modern Art History' enrollment is the most recent update.

episodes.body: The GPS tracker was installed in the Berlin facility for initial calibration.
The tracker was transferred to the Paris office for further testing.
The device was finally stationed at the London headquarters for permanent use.

queries.query: Where is the GPS tracker currently stationed?
queries.expected_reason: The London headquarters fact is the most recent and valid at the query time.

queries.query: Where was the GPS tracker located in September 2022?
queries.expected_reason: The Paris office fact was valid during September 2022.

queries.query: What is the latest known location of the GPS tracker?
queries.expected_reason: The London headquarters is the latest known location.

episodes.body: The device was initially located in the New York office for testing purposes.
Due to project requirements, the device was relocated to the San Francisco branch.
The device was moved to the Los Angeles headquarters for a new deployment phase.

queries.query: Where is the device currently located?
queries.expected_reason: The Los Angeles headquarters fact is the most recent and valid at the query time.

queries.query: Where was the device located in July 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The San Francisco branch fact was valid during July 2023.

queries.query: What was the sequence of locations for the device?
queries.gold_answer: New York office, San Francisco branch, Los Angeles headquarters
queries.expected_reason: The timeline requires all location changes in order.

episodes.body: Ticket #1234 was opened by John Doe for a software bug in the Alpha application.
Ticket #1234 was assigned to technician Jane Smith for investigation.
Jane Smith resolved the issue in ticket #1234 and marked it as closed.
Ticket #1234 was reopened by John Doe due to a recurring issue.

queries.query: What is the current status of ticket #1234?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was reopened after being marked as closed.

queries.query: Who was assigned to ticket #1234 on November 2, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Jane Smith was the technician assigned on the specified date.

queries.query: What was the sequence of events for ticket #1234?
queries.expected_reason: The timeline includes all status changes in order.
